description_long: This is an elegant, high-backed chaise upholstered in a light cream fabric with a tufted button design on the backrest, giving it a classic and luxurious appearance. The seat is wide and comfortably padded, divided into two main sections, and accompanied by four decorative throw pillows in a darker, patterned fabric. The armrests are gently curved and padded, seamlessly integrated into the overall silhouette of the chaise. The base is accented with a row of decorative nailhead trim, adding a touch of sophistication. The legs are short, turned, and finished in a dark wood, providing sturdy support and a traditional aesthetic. The back of the chaise is plain and fully upholstered, maintaining a clean and refined look from all angles.
description: A high-backed, tufted cream chaise with curved armrests, dark turned legs, and four patterned throw pillows for added comfort and style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tufted backrest, two seat cushions, curved armrests, and four decorative pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chaise's depth, the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the arrangement of the pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, fully upholstered back and the six dark wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the chaise's profile, armrest, and pillow placement.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and straight with a deep button-tufted design, creating a diamond pattern across the surface. It is fully upholstered in cream fabric and extends the full width of the chaise, giving it a stately and plush appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both sides feature gently curved, padded armrests that are integrated into the frame and upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, turned, and made of dark wood, featuring a classic spindle design that adds a traditional touch to the overall look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid cream color with a prominent button-tufted pattern on the backrest, while the seat and armrests are smooth. The throw pillows have a contrasting dark, intricate pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are four loose, square throw pillows arranged symmetrically along the backrest, with two on each side, and two large, attached seat cushions forming the main seating area.
